_comment: Dev-tunable fences and numbers for the safe-pr deterministic gate. NOT a risk map — these are hard limits and deny-list globs only. Numbers are starting guesses; tune against real PRs. A repo-level override file (.safe-pr.config.json at the target repo root) is merged on top when present.

branch_naming._comment: Branch must start with a Jira ticket id, e.g. DEV-12345_some-logical-name. ticket_regex validates the id the operator provides; branch_regex is what an already-created branch must match.
